ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Continued To Oct-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Continued To Oct-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared via zoom for Iyob Tseggai (proposed executor).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 09, 2020 is admitted to probate. Iyob Tseggai is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00 Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 25, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Continued To Nov-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
